title: MMV Control Room (Primary)
description: Primary control room helpline for urgent hostel support at Kundan Devi Malviya Hostel.

title: MMV Control Room (Secondary)
description: Secondary control room number for backup emergency coordination.

title: MMV Hostel Ambulance Support
description: Emergency medical transport support for MMV hostel residents.

title: MMV Wi-Fi Office
description: Support line for internet and hostel connectivity issues.

title: MMV Electrician Support
description: Electrical maintenance contact for hostel infrastructure issues.

title: MMV Athletic Association Practice
description: Sports and recreational activities include table tennis, badminton, volleyball, chess, basketball, kho-kho, tug of war, cricket, throwball, football, handball, athletics, kabaddi, and kick boxing.

title: Jyoti Kunj Purchase Committee (FY 2025-26)
description: Committee for Jyoti Kunj Hostel includes Chairperson/Admin Warden Dr. Gautam Geeta Jiwatram, Co-ordinator Dr. Seema Tiwari, and member wardens Dr. Kavita Pandey, Dr. Shweta Kumari, and Dr. Rukmani Jaiswal.
